data.boss_ai_decision:
STATUS: RISKY
REASON: Significant conflict between combined xG (2.84) and Over 2.5 goals potential (27.0%). BTTS potential (37.0%) also contradicts combined xG. Missing model predictions, standings, H2H, and key sidelined data limit comprehensive analysis.
CONCLUSION: Home Win. Operário PR shows higher xG (1.76), better PPG (1.5), and is favored by odds (2.2). This outcome is consistently supported across available, non-conflicting metrics.

CONCLUSION: No Bet / Skip
